steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The second sentence, “Other animals also find tools helpful,” explicitly sets up the need for an example of nonhuman tool use to follow. This is the only direct clue that the underlined sentence must support this purpose.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice A aligns with the signal by offering the example of boxer crabs using anemones as a direct illustration of animals benefiting from tools.

The other three choices either reverse the focus to humans (C), introduce unsupported claims of comparison (B and D), or misrepresent the crab example’s role.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
